title: Delete timeline column created by Portfolio linkage
excerpt: I recently tested the new portfolio feature and added one of our main boards to the test portfolio to see how the data lined up. This converted my board to a portfolio board and left me with a timeline column that cannot…

posts.author: RichardWhale (Richard Whale)
posts.cookedHtml:
I recently tested the new portfolio feature and added one of our main boards to the test portfolio to see how the data lined up. This converted my board to a portfolio board and left me with a timeline column that cannot be deleted, even after the test portfolio is deleted.

I would like the ability to delete the unnecessary and unwanted timeline column that was automatically created.
